deck.name: Below is a 100‐card Edgar Markov Vampire tribal deck. (Remember that in Commander you’re allowed any number of basic lands, so the basics are each “1x” even when there are many copies.) You’ll find 60 non–land cards (including your commander, creatures, spells, artifacts, etc.) and 40 lands. You can tweak numbers or swap out cards as needed, but here’s a complete sample list formatted with one copy per line:
deck.oracle_text: Unknown

deck.name: ──────────────────────────────
deck.oracle_text: Unknown

deck.name: • NONLAND CARDS (60)
deck.oracle_text: Unknown

deck.name: Edgar Markov
deck.oracle_text:
Eminence — Whenever you cast another Vampire spell, if Edgar Markov is in the command zone or on the battlefield, create a 1/1 black Vampire creature token.
First strike, haste
Whenever Edgar Markov attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on each Vampire you control.

deck.name: Bloodline Keeper // Lord of Lineage
deck.oracle_text: No description available

deck.name: Captivating Vampire
deck.oracle_text:
Other Vampire creatures you control get +1/+1.
Tap five untapped Vampires you control: Gain control of target creature. It becomes a Vampire in addition to its other types.

deck.name: Kalitas, Traitor of Ghet
deck.oracle_text:
Lifelink
If a nontoken creature an opponent controls would die, instead exile that card and create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.
{2}{B}, Sacrifice another Vampire or Zombie: Put two +1/+1 counters on Kalitas, Traitor of Ghet.

deck.name: Drana, Liberator of Malakir
deck.oracle_text:
Flying, first strike
Whenever Drana, Liberator of Malakir deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each attacking creature you control.

deck.name: Stromkirk Captain
deck.oracle_text:
First strike
Other Vampire creatures you control get +1/+1 and have first strike.

deck.name: Stromkirk Occultist
deck.oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever Stromkirk Occultist deals combat damage to a player, exile the top card of your library. Until end of turn, you may play that card.
Madness {1}{R} (If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)

deck.name: Vampire Nocturnus
deck.oracle_text:
Play with the top card of your library revealed.
As long as the top card of your library is black, Vampire Nocturnus and other Vampire creatures you control get +2/+1 and have flying.

deck.name: Champion of Dusk
deck.oracle_text: When Champion of Dusk enters, you draw X cards and you lose X life, where X is the number of Vampires you control.

deck.name: Indulgent Aristocrat
deck.oracle_text:
Lifelink
{2}, Sacrifice a creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on each Vampire you control.

deck.name: Gifted Aetherborn
deck.oracle_text: Deathtouch, lifelink

deck.name: Falkenrath Noble
deck.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever Falkenrath Noble or another creature dies, target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

deck.name: Vampire Cutthroat
deck.oracle_text:
Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)

deck.name: Butcher of Malakir
deck.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever Butcher of Malakir or another creature you control dies, each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice.

deck.name: Vampire Hexmage
deck.oracle_text:
First strike
Sacrifice Vampire Hexmage: Remove all counters from target permanent.

deck.name: Falkenrath Gorger
deck.oracle_text: Each Vampire creature card you own that isn't on the battlefield has madness. The madness cost is equal to its mana cost. (If you discard a card with madness, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)

deck.name: Vampire Aristocrat
deck.oracle_text: Sacrifice a creature: Vampire Aristocrat gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

deck.name: Sanctum Seeker
deck.oracle_text: Whenever a Vampire you control attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

deck.name: Pitiless Pontiff
deck.oracle_text: {1}, Sacrifice another creature: Pitiless Pontiff gains deathtouch and indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)

deck.name: Bloodmist Infiltrator
deck.oracle_text: Whenever Bloodmist Infiltrator attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, Bloodmist Infiltrator can't be blocked this turn.

deck.name: Vampiric Tutor
deck.oracle_text: Search your library for a card, then shuffle and put that card on top. You lose 2 life.

deck.name: Dark Ritual
deck.oracle_text: Add {B}{B}{B}.

deck.name: Exquisite Blood
deck.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent loses life, you gain that much life.

deck.name: Sorin, Imperious Bloodlord
deck.oracle_text:
+1: Target creature you control gains deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn. If it's a Vampire, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
+1: You may sacrifice a Vampire. When you do, Sorin, Imperious Bloodlord deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.
−3: You may put a Vampire creature card from your hand onto the battlefield.

deck.name: Anguished Unmaking
deck.oracle_text: Exile target nonland permanent. You lose 3 life.

deck.name: Mortify
deck.oracle_text: Destroy target creature or enchantment.

deck.name: Utter End
deck.oracle_text: Exile target nonland permanent.

deck.name: Sol Ring
deck.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.

deck.name: Talisman of Indulgence
deck.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}. Talisman of Indulgence deals 1 damage to you.

deck.name: Blasphemous Act
deck.oracle_text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield.
Blasphemous Act deals 13 damage to each creature.

deck.name: Faithless Looting
deck.oracle_text:
Draw two cards, then discard two cards.
Flashback {2}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

deck.name: Swords to Plowshares
deck.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.

deck.name: Rakdos Charm
deck.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Exile target player's graveyard.
• Destroy target artifact.
• Each creature deals 1 damage to its controller.

deck.name: Exsanguinate
deck.oracle_text: Each opponent loses X life. You gain life equal to the life lost this way.

deck.name: Dictate of Erebos
deck.oracle_text:
Flash
Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice.

deck.name: Bitterblossom
deck.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life and create a 1/1 black Faerie Rogue creature token with flying.

deck.name: Sign in Blood
deck.oracle_text: Target player draws two cards and loses 2 life.

deck.name: Skullclamp
Anointed Procession
deck.oracle_text: If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.

deck.name: Falkenrath Marauders
deck.oracle_text:
Flying
Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)
Whenever Falkenrath Marauders deals combat damage to a player, put two +1/+1 counters on it.

deck.name: Bloodfell Caves
deck.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.

deck.name: Demonic Tutor
deck.oracle_text: Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle.

deck.name: Mind Stone
deck.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice Mind Stone: Draw a card.

deck.name: Commander's Sphere
deck.oracle_text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
Sacrifice Commander's Sphere: Draw a card.

deck.name: Toxic Deluge
deck.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life.
All creatures get -X/-X until end of turn.

deck.name: Wheel of Fortune
deck.oracle_text: Each player discards their hand, then draws seven cards.

deck.name: Bedevil
deck.oracle_text: Destroy target artifact, creature, or planeswalker.

deck.name: Duskborne Skymarcher
deck.oracle_text:
Flying
{W}, {T}: Target attacking Vampire gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

deck.name: Chaos Warp
deck.oracle_text: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library, then reveals the top card of their library. If it's a permanent card, they put it onto the battlefield.

deck.name: Vampiric Rage
deck.oracle_text: Unknown

deck.name: Bloodhusk Ritualist
deck.oracle_text:
Multikicker {B} (You may pay an additional {B} any number of times as you cast this spell.)
When Bloodhusk Ritualist enters, target opponent discards a card for each time it was kicked.

deck.name: Diabolic Intent
deck.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.
Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle.

deck.name: Arcane Signet
deck.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

deck.name: Legion Warboss
deck.oracle_text:
Mentor (Whenever this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature with lesser power.)
At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token. That token gains haste until end of turn and attacks this combat if able.

deck.name: Falkenrath Raider
deck.oracle_text: Unknown

deck.name: Vampire Nighthawk
deck.oracle_text:
Flying
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)

deck.name: Falkenrath Pit Fighter
deck.oracle_text: {1}{R}, Discard a card, Sacrifice a Vampire: Draw two cards. Activate only if an opponent lost life this turn.

deck.oracle_text: Unknown

deck.name: • LAND CARDS (40)
deck.oracle_text: Unknown

deck.name: Bloodstained Mire
deck.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice Bloodstained Mire: Search your library for a Swamp or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

deck.name: Arid Mesa
deck.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice Arid Mesa: Search your library for a Mountain or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

deck.name: Marsh Flats
deck.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice Marsh Flats: Search your library for a Plains or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

deck.name: Clifftop Retreat
deck.oracle_text:
Clifftop Retreat enters tapped unless you control a Mountain or a Plains.
{T}: Add {R} or {W}.

deck.name: Godless Shrine
deck.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {W} or {B}.)
As Godless Shrine enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

deck.name: Blood Crypt
deck.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {B} or {R}.)
As Blood Crypt enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

deck.name: Sacred Foundry
deck.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {R} or {W}.)
As Sacred Foundry enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

deck.name: Dragonskull Summit
deck.oracle_text:
Dragonskull Summit enters tapped unless you control a Swamp or a Mountain.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.

deck.name: Command Tower
deck.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

deck.name: Exotic Orchard
deck.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.

deck.oracle_text: Unknown

deck.name: Total: 60 non‑lands + 40 lands = 100 cards
deck.oracle_text: Unknown

deck.name: This deck uses Edgar Markov as a tax–losing, aggressive commander that “pumps” your fellow vampire creatures while swinging for value with tribal synergies, recursion, token production (from Bitterblossom and Legion Warboss) and plenty of removal and ramp. Enjoy experimenting with and tailoring the build to your play style!
